data.name: Monster MILF Hunter
data.detailed_description:
Better. Improved. More fun!

The quasi-sequel of 'Fantasy MILF Hunter' is here!

Eros Vis presents to you, 'Monster MILF Hunter!'

***

You are (once again, but different) 'Hunter,' the world's strongest 'human.'

You arrive at 'Klitoris,' a bustling adventurer town that's been made famous for its '6 Impossible Quest.!'

Complete the 6 Impossible Quests, and you'll have the 7 beautiful 'monster' MILFs of Klitoris all for yourself!

***

Game Mechanics:

- Navigate through the 'Milky Maze' to face Mina, the shy-cutie minotauress!



- Confront Dracine the Dragoness, the world's most powerful 'being' at the Dragon Lair!



- Solve the Three Riddles given by Baby Sphinx to awaken Nefertiri, the sleeping Mummy Princess!



- Challenge and combat the muscular beauty Oakley the Onslaughter, the world's most powerful 'mortal!'



- Race Klitoris' sprint champion, the gorgeous Connie the Comet, to gain the right to mate her for life!



- Rescue Arachelle the Spider Queen from the Killer Wasps and make her covet for your strong, manly semen!



- Once the 6 Impossible Quests are complete, the secretly-horny werewolf Guild Clerk Romula will fall for you!



- Enjoy the two default role-plays 'Vanilla and Stepmom & Stepson' upon seducing the 7 MILFs! Oh, and a few kinky fetishes too!



- Unlock 'Master & Servant' role-play by defeating the final boss, the Kraken of Lake Drake!



- Greet a familiar face at Lustilos Express, where you will have to barter for key items to progress through quests!

data.short_description: Conquer the 7 Monster MILFs of Klitoris!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
